quote: Varuna delivered the Shopify optimization project on time and was very transparent about what was achievable with the budget. The store loads noticeably faster and mobile experience is much smoother now.
author: Client Name
note: Reach out to your boutique client and ask for a real testimonial — offer to write a draft for them to edit.

quote: Varuna set up our entire analytics system and actually took the time to explain what the numbers mean. Now we know which products to focus our ads on instead of guessing.
author: Client Name
note: Ask your analytics client for a quick 2-3 sentence review. LinkedIn or email works fine.

quote: As Varuna's project mentor during her MCA, I saw her grow from a student to a professional who ships real, well-structured work. Her portfolio and projects demonstrate strong self-taught initiative.
author: Professor / Mentor Name
company: Dr. B.V. Hiray College of Management
note: Ask your MCA professor or project guide for a short recommendation quote.

quote: Varuna is highly motivated, detail-oriented, and communicates clearly throughout the project. She asks the right questions before diving into solutions — rare quality in an early-career developer.
author: Peer / Collaborator Name
note: Ask a teammate, peer, or internship colleague for a genuine quote about working with you.
